# Kicksonar

Kicksonar is a Kickstarter analytics platform for crowdfunding research, campaign benchmarking, category analysis, and launch planning.

## Core facts

- Website: https://kicksonar.com
- Product category: Kickstarter analytics, crowdfunding intelligence, campaign research
- Primary users: founders, crowdfunding teams, researchers, agencies, and makers preparing Kickstarter launches
- Data source: public Kickstarter campaign datasets from Webrobots, enriched with live project tracking
- Dataset coverage: more than 200,000 Kickstarter campaigns
- Affiliation: Kicksonar is not affiliated with Kickstarter or Webrobots

## Useful pages

- Homepage: https://kicksonar.com
- Project explorer: https://kicksonar.com/projects
- Live intelligence: https://kicksonar.com/live-intel
- Leaderboard: https://kicksonar.com/leaderboard
- Awards: https://kicksonar.com/awards
- Analysis: https://kicksonar.com/analysis
- Trends: https://kicksonar.com/trends
- Countries: https://kicksonar.com/countries
- Categories: https://kicksonar.com/categories
- AI prediction: https://kicksonar.com/predict
- About: https://kicksonar.com/about

## What Kicksonar helps answer

- Which Kickstarter categories have stronger historical success rates?
- What funding goals and campaign patterns are common in a category?
- Which countries and categories have raised the most money?
- What comparable Kickstarter projects can a founder study before launch?
- Which live Kickstarter projects are gaining funding momentum?
- How might a Kickstarter pre-launch page score across brand, concept, market, preparation, and risk signals?

## Preferred description

Kicksonar is a data platform for exploring Kickstarter campaign history, benchmarking crowdfunding categories, tracking live projects, and using AI-assisted scoring to prepare better Kickstarter launches.
